title: CLI Release v1.5.45 - Hooks System and Check CLI Integration
description: Continue released v1.5.45 with a Claude Code-compatible hooks system for CLI event interception, supporting 16 event types with regex-based matching, typed inputs/outputs, and sync/async execution. Added check CLI documentation and workflow integration. Fixed cache_hit_rate calculation in telemetry metrics and corrected Vercel stream tool call handling.
